text.tspan: M2 Module Architecture: Parser Functions and Data Flow
Thread-safe · Zero heap allocation · All state in caller-supplied buffers
No malloc · no memcpy of body
Per-line loop until empty line or MAX_HEADERS:
· obs-fold: line[0]==' '|'\t' → append to prev value
Sets req→body · req→body_len on empty line
const http_request_t *req · const char *name → const char *
